title: Calculation_and_Normalization_of_Relative_Gene_Abundance
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2nu6l","text":"Calculate the relative abundance of gene for metagenome analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mapping the clean reads (abc.clean.read1.fq.gz, abc.clean.read2.fq.gz) of each sample to all sequences of the indexed gene catalog Bwa mapping bwa mem -t 20 ./MGCA_gene_Catalog.fasta ./abc.clean.read1.fq.gz 2> ./abc.clean.read1.fq.gz.log | gzip - > ./abc.clean.read1.fq.gz.sam.gzbwa mem -t 20 ./MGCA_gene_Catalog.fasta ./abc.clean.read2.fq.gz 2> ./abc.clean.read2.fq.gz.log | gzip - > ./abc.clean.read2.fq.gz.sam.gz Mapping the reads to fasta files

Stat of bwa mapping perl ./bwa_mapping_stat.pl ./abc.clean.read1.fq.gz.sam.gz ./abc.clean.read2.fq.gz.sam.gz --out ./abc.clean.fq.gz.sam.gz 2> ./abc.clean.fq.gz.sam.gz.stat.log Calculation and normalization of relative gene abundance bwa_mapping_stat.pl
Construction of the bwa index for the gene catalog (MGCA_gene_Catalog.fasta) Construction of bwa index bwa index ./MGCA_gene_Catalog.fasta Construction of bwa index for fasta sequences bwa
Selecting the first and last columns from the output file (abc.clean.fq.gz.sam.gz..mapping.abundance), which representing the gene id and the normalized relative abundance of the gene
creator: greatjf
